flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Lincoln Memorial University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (42.8% → 36.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lincoln Memorial University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.2k → $26.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lincoln Memorial University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($24.2k → $26.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lincoln Memorial University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
